title: MQTT Envelope
description: Standard wrapper for all OSPP MQTT messages, providing routing, versioning, and optional integrity verification

messageId.description: Unique identifier for this message, used for correlation and deduplication

messageType.description: The type of message: REQUEST for commands, RESPONSE for replies, EVENT for notifications

action.description: The action name identifying which operation this message relates to

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when this message was created

source.description: The origin of this message. Most messages use the literal sender ('station' for station-originated, 'server' for server-originated). For ConnectionLost (LWT), the source is 'server' because the broker-side infrastructure detects the disconnection and publishes the retained will message.

protocolVersion.description: Semantic version of the OSPP protocol

payload.description: The action-specific payload; validated by individual message schemas

mac.description: Optional base64-encoded HMAC for message integrity verification
